_publications._publicationTitle: Comparing 3D imaging devices for the measurement of cutaneous neurofibromas in patients with Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: LifeViz Micro had the shortest total image acquisition and analysis time (∼4.5 min)... For surface area, the LifeViz Micro demonstrated the least measurement variability compared to the other two imaging systems
details: Had shortest total image acquisition and analysis time (~4.5 min) and demonstrated least measurement variability for surface area compared to other systems
